summary: Strategic Product Manager with 6+ years driving user-centric solutions in SaaS. Proven track record of launching features that increase retention by 40%+ through data-driven prioritization and cross-functional leadership. Seeking to leverage product strategy expertise to help Stripe scale payment infrastructure globally.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
bullets: Spearheaded API platform redesign serving 50K+ developers, increasing adoption by 65% and reducing support tickets by 40% through improved documentation and SDK quality
Led cross-functional team of 12 to launch payment processing feature generating $3.2M ARR within 6 months, achieving 95% customer satisfaction score
Architected product roadmap using data-driven prioritization framework, resulting in 28% increase in feature adoption and 15% improvement in user retention
Optimized onboarding flow through A/B testing and user research, reducing time-to-value from 14 days to 3 days and increasing activation rate by 45%

experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Launched mobile app from 0 to 100K users in 8 months, achieving 4.7-star rating and featured in App Store 'New Apps We Love'
Collaborated with engineering team of 8 to deliver 15+ features quarterly while maintaining 99.9% uptime and sub-200ms API response times
Transformed customer feedback into actionable insights using SQL and Amplitude, identifying 3 high-impact features that increased engagement by 35%

experience.title: Associate Product Manager
bullets: Managed B2B dashboard product serving 500+ enterprise clients, delivering quarterly releases that improved workflow efficiency by 30%
Conducted 40+ user interviews and usability tests to inform product decisions, resulting in 25% reduction in customer churn
Coordinated with sales and customer success teams to prioritize features, contributing to $1.8M in upsell revenue
